hero.headline:
Your Universal Streaming Watchlist.
Track Movies & Series Everywhere.
hero.subtitle: Discover, track, and share movies and series across Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, and more. The ultimate movie tracker and streaming guide—all in one place.
hero.androidBadgeSubtitle: Join the waitlist and be the first to know.

features.title: Everything You Need in a Movie Tracker
features.subtitle: From streaming discovery to series tracking, SeeUs is your complete guide across all platforms.

discovery.title: Smart Discovery
discovery.description: Get personalized movie and series recommendations powered by your watch history and preferences.

tracking.title: Unified Tracking
tracking.description: Track movies and TV series across Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, Hulu, and all your streaming services.

social.title: Social Watchlist
social.description: Create and share watchlists with friends. Build your ultimate movie queue together.

calendar.title: Release Calendar
calendar.description: Never miss a premiere. Get alerts for new seasons, movie releases, and series premieres.

ratings.title: Smart Ratings
ratings.description: Compare scores from IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes, and Metacritic in one unified view.

offline.title: Offline Mode
offline.description: Browse your movie library and manage your watchlist even without an internet connection.

platforms.title: Available Everywhere
platforms.subtitle: SeeUs comes to all your devices. Start on one, continue on another.

web.name: Web

windows.name: Windows

roadmap.title: What's Coming Next
roadmap.subtitle: Here's what we're building. Follow along as we bring SeeUs to every platform.

q1_2026.title: Core Platform Launch
q1_2026.description: Initial release with web app, basic tracking, and cross-platform watchlist sync.

q2_2026.title: Social Features
q2_2026.description: Friend lists, shared watchlists, activity feeds, and comment threads.

q3_2026.title: Mobile Apps
q3_2026.description: Native Android app with offline mode, widgets, and push notifications.

q4_2026.title: Recommendation Engine
q4_2026.description: AI-powered suggestions based on watch history, genre preferences, and social trends.

q1_2027.title: Windows Desktop App
q1_2027.description: Native Windows client with system tray, PIP mode, and keyboard shortcuts.

q2_2027.title: API & Integrations
q2_2027.description: Public API for third-party developers and integrations with Plex, Jellyfin, and Kodi.

section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
section.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SeeUs.

items.question: Is SeeUs free?
items.answer: Yes. SeeUs offers a free version with essential features. A Premium version is available for users who want additional capabilities.

items.question: Do I need to create an account?
items.answer: No. You can start using SeeUs immediately. Creating an account allows you to synchronize your data across devices.

items.question: How do I sync my data?
items.answer: Simply sign in with your account. Your watchlists, favorites and preferences are automatically synchronized.

items.question: Is there an Android app?
items.answer: Yes. SeeUs is available for Android devices.

items.question: Is there a Windows version?
items.answer: Not yet. The web version works on Windows, and a native desktop application is part of our roadmap.

items.question: How does Premium work?
items.answer: Premium unlocks additional features and helps support the continued development of SeeUs.

items.question: Does SeeUs track where I watch my content?
items.answer: No. SeeUs helps organize what you watch but does not monitor where you stream your content.

items.question: Can I import my existing watchlists?
items.answer: Import functionality is planned and will be available in a future update.
